recentPipeline.spec: Add internal links to FAQ answers for SEO interlinking (/quiz, /archetype, /chat)
recentPipeline.rationale: FAQ answers now have <Link> to /quiz, /archetype, /chat. JSON-LD unchanged (plain text). SEO internal linking complete. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (Google indexing in progress, all on-page SEO complete) + 0 revenue (Creem pending). 8 consecutive ACTs.

recentPipeline.spec: Fix result page OG image: dynamic scores from URL params instead of hardcoded s=75-60-50
recentPipeline.rationale: Shared quiz result links now show the users real archetype in social previews instead of a generic card. Server-side generateMetadata reads scores from URL params. Fallback to default when no params. Build green, 368 tests pass, pushed. CDN cache for old static pages will auto-expire. ProductQuality stays 3 — main blockers: 0 organic traffic (Google indexing in progress) + 0 revenue (Creem needs human API key setup). 9 consecutive ACTs.

recentPipeline.spec: Show auth requirement upfront on quiz tier selection — replace silent login redirect with clear badge + spinner
recentPipeline.rationale: Standard tier had silent auth redirect — users clicked expecting to start test, got bounced to login. Now shows Free account required badge + spinner during auth check. Login page was #1 referrer (30 views/week) confirming this friction. Build green, 368 tests pass, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 10 consecutive ACTs.

recentPipeline.spec: Fix quiz_complete analytics deduplication with useRef guard
recentPipeline.rationale: quiz_complete was firing on every result page visit (useEffect with multiple deps). Added hasTrackedComplete useRef guard so it only fires once per component mount. Fixes funnel anomaly where quiz_complete(4) > quiz_start(2). All key pages 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 3 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 11 consecutive ACTs.

recentPipeline.spec: Optimize framer-motion bundle: LazyMotion + m components on result page (~78kB → ~5kB)
recentPipeline.rationale: Result page framer-motion reduced from ~78kB static import to ~5kB with LazyMotion+domAnimation+m.* shorthand. Mechanical replacement: motion.div→m.div, wrapped in <LazyMotion features={domAnimation}>. All key pages 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 12 consecutive ACTs.

questions: Are recent actions producing measurable results?
Should we change strategy based on traffic trends?
What contradictions exist in our observations?
What should the next pipeline focus on?
